texto: A constant stream of 'free' money is a perfect way to keep an inefficient or simply bad government in power. As aid flows in, there is nothing more for the government to do - it doesn't need to raise taxes, and as long as it pays the army, it doesn't have to take account of its disgruntled citizens.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Dambisa Moyo sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “A constant stream of 'free' money is a perfect way to keep an inefficient or simply bad governmen…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, money, government, útil em momentos de government e free.

texto: In a perfect world what poor countries at the lowest rungs of economic development need is not a multi-party democracy, but in fact a decisive benevolent dictator to push through the reforms required to get the economy moving
